gold_answer: [[['Dover', 'inconclusive'], ['Plymouth', 'Dutch Republic'], ['Elba', 'United Provinces (Dutch victory)'], ['Kentish Knock', 'Commonwealth of England'], ['Dungeness', 'Dutch'], ['Portland', 'Commonwealth of England'], ['Leghorn', 'United Provinces (Dutch victory)'], ['Gabbard', 'Commonwealth of England'], ['Scheveningen', 'English Commonwealth']], [['Lowestoft', 'England'], ['Vågen', ['Dutch Republic', 'Denmark–Norway']], ["Four Days' Battle", 'Dutch Republic'], ["St. James' Day", 'England'], ["Holmes'Bonfire", 'England'], ['Dungeness Raid on the Medway', 'Dutch Republic'], ['Landguard Fort', 'England'], ['New Netherland', 'England'], ['Barbados', 'England'], ['Nevis', 'England'], ['Martinique', 'England'], ['Cayenne', 'England'], ['Fort Zeelandia', 'England']], [['Action of 12 March 1672', 'Dutch Republic'], ['Battle of Solebay', 'Dutch Republic'], ['1st Dutch invasion of Saint Helena', 'Dutch Republic'], ['Dutch Raid on North America', 'Dutch'], ['Reconquest of New Netherland', 'Dutch Republic'], ['Second Battle of the James River (1673)', 'Dutch Republic'], ['2nd Dutch invasion of Saint Helena', 'England'], ['First Battle of the Schooneveld', 'Dutch Republic'], ['Second Battle of the Schooneveld', 'Dutch Republic'], ['Battle of Texel', 'Dutch Republic'], ['Battle of Masulipatnam', 'Dutch Republic'], ['Battle of Ronas Voe', 'Kingdom of England']]]
